name: Detect Secrets Before Write
description: Block file writes that contain hardcoded API keys or secrets

then.prompt: Before writing this file, verify it does NOT contain: 1) Hardcoded API keys (sk-, AKIA, ghp_, openrouter key patterns), 2) Hardcoded passwords or PINs in plaintext, 3) Database connection strings with credentials, 4) Any string that looks like a secret. If secrets are found, DENY the write and suggest using environment variables instead.
